category.scope_note: Grid-tied photovoltaic inverter comparison for China-to-Myanmar export. Energy storage inverter and hybrid storage functions are excluded.

labels.zh: 并网光伏逆变器（不含储能）
labels.zht: 併網光伏逆變器（不含儲能）

title.en: China-to-Myanmar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国光伏逆变器进入缅甸：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國光伏逆變器進入緬甸：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China grid-tied PV inverter documentation against Myanmar market access expectations under MSTRD and MIC.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国并网光伏逆变器文件与缅甸（MSTRD / MIC）准入要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國併網光伏逆變器文件與緬甸（MSTRD / MIC）准入要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, or market-access approval. Myanmar regulatory frameworks for PV inverters are evolving; many standards are voluntary and enforcement varies. Exporters and importers should verify current MSTRD, MIC, MEPE, and ESE requirements with qualified local professionals before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见或市场准入批准。缅甸光伏逆变器监管框架仍在演变，许多标准为自愿性质，执行情况因地而异。出口商和进口商在出货前应与合格的当地专业人士核验MSTRD、MIC、MEPE及ESE的现行要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見或市場准入批准。緬甸光伏逆變器監管框架仍在演變，許多標準為自願性質，執行情況因地而異。出口商和進口商在出貨前應與合格的當地專業人士核驗MSTRD、MIC、MEPE及ESE的現行要求。

answer_first.en: Myanmar lacks a mandatory horizontal product safety or EMC directive; most conformity requirements are voluntary MSTRD standards aligned with IEC. The practical import gap is MIC import-permit documentation and MEPE/ESE grid-interconnection approval, not a CE-style mandatory certification mark.
answer_first.zh: 缅甸尚无强制性横向产品安全或EMC指令，大多数合规要求为与IEC接轨的MSTRD自愿性标准。实际进口差距主要体现在MIC进口许可文件和MEPE/ESE并网审批，而非CE式强制认证标志。
answer_first.zht: 緬甸尚無強制性橫向產品安全或EMC指令，大多數合規要求為與IEC接軌的MSTRD自願性標準。實際進口差距主要體現在MIC進口許可文件和MEPE/ESE並網審批，而非CE式強制認證標誌。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true. Myanmar regulatory sources are limited — flag any official source gaps.
